raw.message:
Parie et regarde le meilleur du Basket US 🏀
Vis le Basket plus fort avec Betclic ! 💪

hook.summary: High-energy basketball highlights mixed with bold betting call-to-actions.
hook.visual_action: Fast cuts between a basketball dunk, players celebrating, and bold yellow and red text graphics.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Best player, I break no limits. Pressure turned me to a menace.

scene_flow: Fast-paced montage of basketball dunks and game action with rhythmic cuts.
Bold text 'PARIE' and 'BASKET US' flashes on screen over the action.
Footage of players celebrating a victory in a crowded arena.
Final promotional screen showing a 100€ freebet offer and a CTA button.
audience_proxy: French-speaking male sports enthusiasts and bettors interested in US basketball.
